name: OnSomeIpProcessRxMessage
title: OnSomeIpProcessRxMessage
description: This callback function is called whenever the IL has received a SOME/IP message.
The return value of this callback determines if the message should be processed by the IL or if it should be ignored. Furthermore the message may be modified before the IL processes the message.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the received SOME/IP message that triggered the callback.

parameters.name: rxChannel
parameters.description: The channel of the application endpoint that received the message.

return: The message will be processed if the callback returns 1.Otherwise the message has been ignored by the callback.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
